message:
Merge PR #2579: prefer structured agent_state in GetAgentBead

When the DB column agent_state is set (e.g. by bd agent state), prefer
it over description-derived state which can be stale. Includes tests.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2579
Author: corymhall (Cory Hall)

Co-Authored-By: Cory Hall <corymhall@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
